description: Defines a condition for conditional probability P(A|B). Used inside event() expressions. Supports solid fill, stroke color, and hatch patterns for the given overlay.

arguments.name: predicate
arguments.description: Event predicate for the condition (e.g., "sum > 5", "first = T", "any > 3", "any even")

arguments.name: color
arguments.description: Color for given outcomes (used with hatchangle for hatch pattern, or as solid fill)

arguments.name: fillColor
arguments.description: Solid fill color for given outcomes

arguments.name: hatchangle
arguments.description: Use hatch lines at given angle instead of solid fill

examples.expression: E = event(S, "at least 2 H", given("first = T", hatchangle(20), c(steelblue)), fc(red))
E = event(S, "sum > 7", given("at least 1 six", c(steelblue)), fc(coral))
E = event(S, "any even", given("any > 3", hatchangle(20), c(steelblue)), fc(red))
E = event(S, "sum > 10", given("all odd", c(lightblue)), fc(orange))
